nasb.text: Oh that my head were waters And my eyes a fountain of tears, That I might weep day and night For the slain of the daughter of my people!

esv.text: Oh that my head were waters, and my eyes a fountain of tears, that I might weep day and night for the slain of the daughter of my people!

cnv.text: 但願我的頭是水井， 我的眼是淚的泉源； 我好為我同胞中被殺的， 晝夜哭泣。

ccb.text: 真希望我的头是水泉， 眼是泪泉， 好为我被杀的同胞昼夜哭泣；
